description: Infrastructure for 13 community validation studies (S1-S13) across four problem domains: Security by Default, Day-2 Problem, Architecture/System Consistency, and Technical Debt.

scripts: scripts/study_debt_correlation.py — Drift score vs. tech-debt correlation (Spearman rho)
docs: docs/STUDY.md §15-§17 — 13 study stubs across three problem domains
docs/EPISTEMICS.md §6-§7 — Intentional incoherence taxonomy + documentation as leading indicator
tests: tests/test_study_infrastructure.py — 15 tests covering kappa, aggregation, correlation, fixtures

policy_gate.criterion: Einführbarkeit — erleichtert Community-Beteiligung an empirischer Validierung
